export const AGED_CARE_STANDARDS = [
  {
    id: "ac-s1",
    code: "S1",

    category: "aged-care"
  },
  {

    code: "S2",
    name: "The Organisation",
    category: "aged-care"
  },
  {
    id: "ac-s3",
    code: "S3",
    name: "The Care & Services",
    category: "aged-care"
  },
  {
    id: "ac-s4",
    code: "S4",
    name: "The Environment",
    category: "aged-care"
  },
  {
    id: "ac-s5",
    code: "S5",
    name: "Clinical Care",
    category: "aged-care"
  },
  {
    id: "ac-s6",
    code: "S6",
    name: "Food & Nutrition",
    category: "aged-care"
  },
  {
    id: "ac-s7",
    code: "S7",
    name: "The Residential Community",
    category: "aged-care"
  }
];
export const NDIS_STANDARDS = [
  {
    id: "ndis-core1",
    code: "Core 1",
    name: "Rights and Responsibilities",
    category: "ndis"
  },
  {
    id: "ndis-core2",
    code: "Core 2",
    name: "Governance and Operational Management",
    category: "ndis"
  },
  {
    id: "ndis-core3",
    code: "Core 3",
    name: "Provision of Supports",
    category: "ndis"
  },
  {
    id: "ndis-core4",
    code: "Core 4",
    name: "Support Environment",
    category: "ndis"
  },
  {
    id: "ndis-hi",
    code: "HI",
    name: "High Intensity Modules",
    category: "ndis"
  }
];
export const ALL_STANDARDS = [
  ...AGED_CARE_STANDARDS,
  ...NDIS_STANDARDS
];
export {
  DOCUMENT_TYPES,
  DOCUMENT_CATEGORIES,
  SECTORS,
  getDocumentTypeLabel,
  getCategoryLabel,
  getCategoryCode,
  getSectorLabel,
  isValidDocumentType,
  isValidCategory,
  isValidSector
} from "/src/app/data/taxonomy.ts";
export const getStandardsByCategory = (category) => {
  return ALL_STANDARDS.filter((s) => s.category === category);
};
export const getStandardById = (id) => {
  return ALL_STANDARDS.find((s) => s.id === id);
};
export const getStandardsByIds = (ids) => {
  return ALL_STANDARDS.filter((s) => ids.includes(s.id));
};

//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
